turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: The first case is Carol Ankenbrandt on behalf of her two children against Richards, No. 91-367. The judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit in this case is affirmed for the reasons stated in an opinion filed with the Clerk. Justices Blackmun and Stevens have each filed an opinion concurring in the judgment; Justice Thomas has joined Justice Stevens.
